title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's Jared Sires built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that drafts customer replies in a sales rep's own voice, reducing administrative burden in GTM work. The tool leverages Claude Code to enable non-technical staff to build AI-powered solutions.
